title: Security analysis: rollback vs safe-advance SSN on OSCORE NVM failure
description: Analyze per RFC 8613 Section 7.2 and AES-CCM nonce uniqueness requirements which approach is safer: decrement sender_seq on NVM failure (risk of reuse on reboot) or advance sender_seq by large margin (e.g. +256 or to next 2^8 boundary) under mutex re-lock. Document chosen approach with rationale in oscore.c comments. Reference python-ano.41 and oscore_ctx_persist_ssn. Set as P0.
close_reason: Security analysis completed: rollback approach documented with rationale per RFC 8613 §7.2/7.5/D.4, python-ano.41, and oscore_ctx_persist_ssn. Updated comments in oscore.c and oscore.h. Tests unaffected as only comments changed.
